examples: The enemy pillbox was blown up with a bang.
When it is time to take them, the pillbox beeps and flashes.
All Peninsula Hotels have pages who are dressed in all-white uniforms with pillbox hats.
Once a hallmark of Saks Fifth Avenue, the solicitous salesperson is now as distant a memory as pillbox hats.
Jacqueline Kennedy was embraced by the public for her glamourous style, becoming an icon thanks to that famous pink suit and pillbox hat.
